optionA.text: 我做事讲究原则和标准，难以接受敷衍了事
optionA.text_en: I stick to principles and standards and find it hard to accept slipshod work.

optionB.text: 我常把别人的需求放在自己前面，乐于付出
optionB.text_en: I often put others' needs first and enjoy giving.

optionA.text: 我对自己要求很高，容易发现不足并想改进
optionA.text_en: I set high standards for myself and easily see room for improvement.

optionB.text: 我很在意别人是否喜欢我、需要我
optionB.text_en: I care a lot about whether others like me and need me.

optionA.text: 我认为对错分明，违规的事会让我不安
optionA.text_en: I see right and wrong clearly; rule-breaking bothers me.

optionB.text: 我善于察觉他人情绪，并愿意给予关怀
optionB.text_en: I am good at reading others' feelings and like to show care.

optionA.text: 我常因事情未达标准而自责或不满
optionA.text_en: I often blame myself or feel dissatisfied when things fall short of standards.

optionB.text: 我享受被人依赖、被人感谢的感觉
optionB.text_en: I enjoy being depended on and thanked.

optionA.text: 我重视规则和秩序，不喜欢随意变通
optionA.text_en: I value rules and order and dislike casual flexibility.

optionB.text: 我习惯先满足他人再考虑自己
optionB.text_en: I am used to satisfying others before considering myself.

optionA.text: 我追求成功和认可，希望被人看见
optionA.text_en: I seek success and recognition and want to be seen.

optionB.text: 我习惯先满足他人再考虑自己
optionB.text_en: I am used to satisfying others before considering myself.

optionA.text: 我做事讲求效率和结果，不喜欢拖沓
optionA.text_en: I focus on efficiency and results and dislike dragging things out.

optionB.text: 我容易与人建立亲密关系，乐于倾听
optionB.text_en: I form close bonds easily and like to listen.

optionA.text: 我在意形象和表现，希望给人留下好印象
optionA.text_en: I care about image and performance and want to make a good impression.

optionB.text: 我常为他人付出，有时会忽略自己的需要
optionB.text_en: I often give to others and sometimes neglect my own needs.

optionA.text: 我目标明确，会全力以赴去达成
optionA.text_en: I have clear goals and go all out to achieve them.

optionB.text: 别人的认可和感激对我很重要
optionB.text_en: Others' recognition and gratitude matter a lot to me.

optionA.text: 我重视原则和正确性，常自我批评
optionA.text_en: I value principles and correctness and often criticize myself.

optionB.text: 我富有创意，情绪和感受很丰富
optionB.text_en: I am creative and have rich emotions and feelings.

optionA.text: 我难以接受不完美，会反复纠错
optionA.text_en: I find it hard to accept imperfection and keep correcting.

optionB.text: 我常感到自己与众不同，有独特审美
optionB.text_en: I often feel different from others and have a distinct aesthetic.

optionA.text: 我做事有清晰的是非观和标准
optionA.text_en: I have a clear sense of right and wrong and standards.

optionB.text: 我容易被美和深刻情感打动
optionB.text_en: I am easily moved by beauty and deep emotion.

optionA.text: 我对自己和他人都有较高要求
optionA.text_en: I hold myself and others to high standards.

optionB.text: 我有时会沉溺于情绪或过去的回忆
optionB.text_en: I sometimes get lost in emotions or memories.

optionA.text: 我习惯理性分析，需要独处思考
optionA.text_en: I tend to analyze rationally and need time alone to think.

optionB.text: 我情绪起伏较大，追求真实与深度
optionB.text_en: My emotions fluctuate; I seek authenticity and depth.

optionA.text: 我喜欢探究事物本质，不爱凑热闹
optionA.text_en: I like to explore the nature of things and avoid crowds.

optionB.text: 我渴望被理解内心，讨厌肤浅
optionB.text_en: I long to be understood and dislike superficiality.

optionA.text: 我倾向于观察和思考，而非立刻参与
optionA.text_en: I tend to observe and think rather than jump in.

optionB.text: 我常觉得自己与周围格格不入
optionB.text_en: I often feel I don't fit in.

optionA.text: 我重视隐私和边界，不轻易表露自己
optionA.text_en: I value privacy and boundaries and don't reveal myself easily.

optionB.text: 我容易被悲伤、美、艺术触动
optionB.text_en: I am easily moved by sadness, beauty, and art.

optionA.text: 我做事前会收集足够信息再决定
optionA.text_en: I gather enough information before deciding.

optionB.text: 我追求独特身份和意义感
optionB.text_en: I seek a unique identity and sense of meaning.

optionA.text: 我注重细节和正确性，讨厌马虎
optionA.text_en: I focus on details and correctness and hate sloppiness.

optionB.text: 我更喜欢独处阅读或研究，节省精力

optionA.text: 我讲原则，难以对错误视而不见

optionB.text: 我对知识感兴趣，喜欢搞清原理

optionA.text: 我容易因不完美而焦虑或生气
optionA.text_en: I get anxious or angry about imperfection.

optionB.text: 我习惯与外界保持一定距离

optionA.text: 我做事有明确标准和底线

optionB.text: 我不喜欢被打扰，需要个人空间

optionA.text: 我追求高效和成果，讨厌失败
optionA.text_en: I pursue efficiency and results and hate to fail.

optionB.text: 我谨慎，会考虑各种风险和可能
optionB.text_en: I am cautious and consider risks and possibilities.

optionA.text: 我善于展示优势，适应不同场合
optionA.text_en: I am good at showing my strengths and adapting to situations.

optionB.text: 我重视承诺和忠诚，需要安全感

optionA.text: 我目标导向强，喜欢挑战

optionB.text: 我常预想最坏情况，提前准备

optionB.text: 我做事前会反复确认，避免出错

optionB.text: 我忠诚于团体或信念，讨厌背叛

optionB.text: 我遇事会多想几步，比较谨慎

optionA.text: 我享受被人依赖和感谢

optionB.text: 我需要在稳定、可预测的环境中才安心

optionB.text: 我更在意团队是否可靠、规则是否清晰，明确后才安心
optionB.text_en: When I have a problem I prefer to confirm direction and risks with someone reliable before acting.

optionA.text: 我喜欢把生活安排得丰富有趣，选择越多越让我兴奋
optionA.text_en: I care more that information is accurate and logic is consistent; I like to think things through.

optionB.text: 我更喜欢节奏平稳、少折腾的生活，变化太多会让我疲惫
optionB.text_en: I care more about hidden dangers and uncertainty; I like to clarify risks first.

optionA.text: 面对压力我倾向于计划新的活动或旅行来转移注意力
optionA.text_en: I don't like frequent socializing and prefer to study, research, or be alone quietly.

optionB.text: 面对压力我倾向于放慢节奏，先让自己平静下来再说
optionB.text_en: I care more that the team is reliable and rules are clear; I feel at ease only when that's settled.
